---
title: "Derrick Chambers"
about:
  template: trestles
  id: hero-heading
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  links:

    - text: "{{< iconify mdi github size=2xl >}}"
      href: https://github.com/d-chambers

    - text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar size=2xl >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=OBeNaFsAAAAJ&hl=en

    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons researchgate size=2xl >}}"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Derrick-Chambers

    - text: "{{< iconify skill-icons linkedin size=2xl >}}"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/derrick-chambers-2145a259/
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Hello, I am Derrick. I am a **research engineer** and **open-source developer** specializing in:

- *mine geophysics*
- *distributed fiber optic sensing*
- *rock mechanics*

Reach out on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/derrick-chambers-2145a259/) if you want to get in touch.

## Education

:::{.credential}
[**Colorado School of Mines**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Golden, CO\
[PhD in Geophysical Engineering &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2021–2024]{.role}
:::

:::{.credential}
[**University of Utah**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Salt Lake City, UT\
[MS in Mining Engineering &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2013–2015]{.role}
:::

:::{.credential}
[**University of Utah**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Salt Lake City, UT\
[BS in Mining Engineering &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2007–2013]{.role}
:::

## Experience

:::{.credential}
[**Institut National de l'Environnement Industriel et Risques**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; France\
[Postdoc &nbsp;·&nbsp; Jan 2026 – present]{.role}
:::

:::{.credential}
[**University College Dublin**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ireland\
[Data Engineer &nbsp;·&nbsp; Aug 2025 – Oct 2025]{.role}
:::

:::{.credential}
[**National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health**]{.institution} &nbsp;·&nbsp; USA\
[Research Engineer &nbsp;·&nbsp; July 2015 – Aug 2025]{.role}
:::

:::
